samples.xml_description:
```xml
<module id="right_shifter">
    <description>Right shifter that shifts an 8-bit input by 1 bit on each rising edge of the clock.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal used for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="d">Input signal to be right-shifted.</input>
        <output id="q" width_description="[7:0]">Output signal representing the result of the right shift operation.</output>
    </ports>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <reg id="q" width="8" init_value="0">Register holding the shifted values.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>On each rising edge of the clock, the contents of the register q are right-shifted by one bit, and the new input bit d is inserted into the most significant position of the register.</implementation>
</module>
```
